query:
SELECT 
  rating,
  indexador,
  is_outlier,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  AVG(zspread) as avg_zspread,
  MIN(zspread) as min_zspread,
  MAX(zspread) as max_zspread
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE indexador IN ('DI SPREAD', 'DI PERCENTUAL')
GROUP BY rating, indexador, is_outlier
ORDER BY rating, indexador, is_outlier;
